passives.desc:
- Gain [BandageOfTheBoundKing] and [BigWelcome] for this Encounter.
- At every Turn Start, the King in Binds blesses this unit with grace.
- The grace of the King in Binds changes every turn, in the following order: [Enhancement], SP Heal, and HP Heal. If there are less than 6 surviving Retainers(Peccatulum Invidiae), boost the grace's strength.
passives.name: Retainer of the King in Binds

passives.desc: Deal +15% damage and take -15% damage
passives.name: Peccatulum Invidiae Class 2

passives.desc: At 10+ Clashes against the same enemy, randomly gain or lose Clash Power by (Clash Count / 10) in a Clash. (rounded down)
passives.name: Refracted Struggle

passives.desc: Entry SP -20
passives.name: Refracted Mind

passives.desc: When all retainers are defeated, the King joins the fight.
passives.name: Closing of the Banquet

passives.desc: When the Body Part is destroyed, apply [BandageOfTheBoundKing] on all enemies.
passives.name: Snapping Bandages

skills.desc:
If target has 6+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +3 [Sinking] Count
skills.name: Enveloping Resignation

skills.desc:
Coin Power +1 for every 6 [Sinking] on target (max 2)
[WinDuel] Inflict +3 [Sinking] Count
[DefeatDuel] Reduce [Sinking] Count by 1
skills.name: Strangling Despair

skills.desc:
If target has [Binding], Clash Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +4 [Sinking] Count
[DefeatDuel] Reduce [Sinking] Potency by 2
skills.name: Chainbreaker

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Binding] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [Vibration] equal to [Sinking] on target

skills.desc:
Coin Power + for every 6 [Sinking] on target (max 2)
[DefeatDuel] Reduce [Sinking] Count by 2
[DefeatDuel] Apply [BandageOfTheBoundKing]
skills.name: Chains of Binding

skills.desc:
If target has [Binding], Clash Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +2 [Sinking] Count
[DefeatDuel] Reduce [Sinking] Potency by 4
skills.name: Thou Wilt Sink

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If this unit dealt damage to the target, inflict [Vibration] equal to [Sinking] on target

skills.desc:
[CantDuel]
[StartBattle] Gain 5 [Binding], 1 [ComeForwardToTheKing], and 2 [Enhancement] next turn.
[WhenUse] Apply 300 Shield to targets with [BandageOfTheBoundKing]
skills.name: Present Thyself Before the King
